TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cory_Blackwell, title = Cory_Blackwell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cory_Blackwell} }

S.FORM: Cory Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1963, byacing te 3 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. qnxan nya Blackwell htagan beh sa Chicago. hiya yaya(Wazirah) mlahang nya. hiya ga mqwas beh Crane pqwasan biru. suruw lga tmwang Wisconsin krahu' pqwasan biru. raral ga,Blackwell mzyu mari cyux pqwasan biru.suruw lga tmwang NBA. Blackwell mtzyaw beh NBA. suruw lga maki Chicago. 1990 kawas Blackwell ru bes nya tmwang kyokay maki Chicago. 1991 kawas Kip McKean psina Blackwell musa maki LA. 1994 kawas Cory Blackwell yaya Wazirah lalu nya,gluw na muslim . 2000 kawas hiya ru Megan ini mtzyaw la.suruw lga wal mt'alax la. 2010 kawas Cory Blackwell tmwang(ICC). hiya misu maki cyalifuniya ,losanci .'bagan lga,hiya ru bes nya Jeraldine musa Chicago,mlahang Chicago ICC. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cory Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1963, byacing te 3 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. qnxan nya Blackwell htagan beh sa Chicago. hiya yaya(Wazirah) mlahang nya. hiya ga mqwas beh Crane pqwasan biru. suruw lga tmwang Wisconsin krahu' pqwasan biru. raral ga,Blackwell mzyu mari cyux pqwasan biru.suruw lga tmwang NBA. Blackwell mtzyaw beh NBA. suruw lga maki Chicago. 1990 kawas Blackwell ru bes nya tmwang kyokay maki Chicago. 1991 kawas Kip McKean psina Blackwell musa maki LA. 1994 kawas Cory Blackwell yaya Wazirah lalu nya,gluw na muslim . 2000 kawas hiya ru Megan ini mtzyaw la.suruw lga wal mt'alax la. 2010 kawas Cory Blackwell tmwang(ICC). hiya misu maki cyalifuniya ,losanci .'bagan lga,hiya ru bes nya Jeraldine musa Chicago,mlahang Chicago ICC. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®orj ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a illinois~…ē, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu s~…ēeattle s~…ēupers~…ēoni ¶~ ®s~…ē. qnxan nja ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o. ńßija jaja(wazirańß) mlańßaŇč nja. ńßija …£a mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß ¶~ ®rane pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. s~…ēuruw l…£a tmwaŇč wis~…ē ¶~ ®ons~…ēin krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. raral …£a,ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell mzju mari ¶~ ®jux pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru.s~…ēuruw l…£a tmwaŇč nő≤a. ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell mtzjaw ő≤eńß nő≤a. s~…ēuruw l…£a maki ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o. **** kawas~…ē ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell ru ő≤es~…ē nja tmwaŇč kjokaj maki ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o. **** kawas~…ē kip m ¶~ ®kean ps~…ēina ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell mus~…ēa maki la. **** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®orj ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell jaja wazirańß lalu nja,…£luw na mus~…ēlim . **** kawas~…ē ńßija ru me…£an ini mtzjaw la.s~…ēuruw l…£a wal mt Ēalax la. **** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®orj ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell tmwaŇč(i ¶~ ® ¶~ ®). ńßija mis~…ēu maki ¶~ ®jali*unija ,los~…ēan ¶~ ®i . Ēő≤a…£an l…£a,ńßija ru ő≤es~…ē nja *eral*ine mus~…ēa ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o,mlańßaŇč ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o i ¶~ ® ¶~ ®. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
